headline: Eli Lilly Balances Actos Class Action Risks With Zepbound Employer Push
summary: A national third party payor class action related to Actos and alleged concealment of bladder cancer risk has been certified against Eli Lilly. In parallel, Eli Lilly has rolled out its Employer Connect platform across a wide network of benefit administrators and pharmacies to expand access to obesity drug Zepbound. These developments arrive as NYSE:LLY trades around $990.33, drawing renewed attention to both its legal exposure and its obesity care ambitions. Eli Lilly, trading on the NYSE...
